objective: Repair the Flask chat handler so /api/chat no longer returns 500. TASK-0013 confirmed site_kb_server.py is calling an unsupported Ollama endpoint at http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/chat. Probe the worker's Ollama API, patch site_kb_server.py to the supported generation/chat endpoint, restart the server, and verify end-to-end success.
required_validation: Probe local Ollama and identify a working inference endpoint using qwen2.5:14b
Patch only the upstream Ollama call path/shape in site_kb_server.py as needed
Confirm local POST http://127.0.0.1:8091/api/chat with message=hello returns HTTP 200 and a non-empty answer
Confirm public POST https://jawed-lapel-dispersed.ngrok-free.dev/api/chat with Origin https://larielsystems.com and header ngrok-skip-browser-warning:true returns HTTP 200
execution_instructions: Start with cd ~/mide-pilot && git pull --ff-only origin main

Probe Ollama endpoints. At minimum test: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:11434/ ; curl -s http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags ; curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"qwen2.5:14b","prompt":"hello","stream":false}' ; if needed test other supported chat/completions endpoint variants and record which one works

Edit ~/Documents/itheia-llm/site_kb_server.py to use the working Ollama endpoint and request shape. Keep the Flask API contract unchanged: /api/chat must still accept message/session_id and return answer for non-stream mode plus SSE tokens for stream mode.
Kill the running Flask process: pkill -f site_kb_server.py
Validate local chat: curl -i -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8091/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"hello","session_id":null}'

Validate public chat through ngrok: curl -i -s -X POST https://jawed-lapel-dispersed.ngrok-free.dev/api/chat -H 'Origin: https://larielsystems.com' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'ngrok-skip-browser-warning: true' -d '{"message":"hello","session_id":null}'
Write pilot_v1/results/TASK-0014.result.json with the working Ollama endpoint, a summary of the code change, and the validation outputs
git add, git commit -m 'worker: TASK-0014 result — repair upstream Ollama endpoint', git push
